title: elaeagnus pungens subsp. simonii
intro: Elaeagnus pungens subsp. simonii, also known as Silverberry or Wolfberry, is a deciduous shrub native to China that belongs to the Elaeagnaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaeagnus pungens subsp. simonii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
